description: Policyholder files a new auto claim following a minor intersection collision without injuries and requests next steps for damage assessment.
system_prompt: You are an auto insurance claims FNOL (First Notice of Loss) assistant. Gather accident essentials empathetically and explain appraisal workflows clearly.
user_conversation: I was involved in a minor fender bender about an hour ago. Thankfully no one was injured, but I need to file a claim for my front bumper.
What happens next for getting my car inspected and repaired?

conversation.user: I was involved in a minor fender bender about an hour ago. Thankfully no one was injured, but I need to file a claim for my front bumper.
conversation.assistant: I am glad to hear that no one was injured. I have created claim number CL-99201 under your policy for the front bumper collision damage.

conversation.user: What happens next for getting my car inspected and repaired?
conversation.assistant: You can submit photos of the bumper damage through our mobile app for a virtual estimate within 24 hours, or take your vehicle to any of our certified Direct Repair auto shops for an immediate appraisal.
conversation.expected: You can submit photos through our mobile app for a virtual estimate within 24 hours or visit any certified Direct Repair shop.

expected_behavior: Chatbot generates a claim number, expresses empathy for the accident, and outlines virtual photo appraisal vs certified repair shop inspection options.
expected_answer: I have opened claim number CL-99201 for your accident. You can upload photos of the bumper damage via our mobile app for a 24-hour virtual estimate or visit a certified Direct Repair facility.
